blended.narrative: Monarch Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,667 ft. Strong winds with gusts to 52 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: flurries, highs of 40°F, gusts to 52 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 24".
